titleStmt.title: SII 24.47: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 47. (A.R. No. 169 of 1951-52.) NĀḺIKĒṬṬĀṈVĀŚAL, WEST AND SOUTH TIERS.

summary.p: Records gift of sheep by a number of individuals for supply of ghee for a perpetual lamp in the temple. Mentions Vīra Vichchādira Mūvēndavēḷār as the Śrīkāryam officer of the temple at whose instance the gift seems to have been made.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavu n=tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jeya makaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putu maṇam puṇarn=ta matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayirmunaik kontaḷa varacar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟaik kaḻittut toḻvali kāṭṭi poṟ pari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟut
nilappāvai tan=taṉimaiyun tavirap punitaṟ tirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi Iraṇṭum taṭa muṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāru vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoruñ cella veṇkuṭai Iru niḻal viḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanātu tiru niḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Oru tani meruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa ci
karuntalai paruntalaittiṭa tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa viṉṉāḷ piṟkulap piṟai pol niṟpiḻai yennum colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuven tuṅkapattirai yaḷavuṟṟu turatti veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan māna mu
cit tan ṉāṭukantu tānuntāṉaiyum panṉāḷiṭṭa(m) pala pala mutukum mārina jaya
m ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Iruvicai ṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu
ttalaṅkaḷum tantira vāriyum Uṭaittāy van=ta vaṭa kaṭal ten kaṭal pāyvatu pola tan peruñ ceṉaiyai yevip pañcavaraiyvaru poruta porkaḷattañci veṟu neḷiyat toṭa yaraṇenappukka kāṭarattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyu
lāpamum muttamiṭ potiyilum matta veṅkarikaḷumaiyaccaiyamuṅ kanniyum (kanniyum) kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāverellām tani vicumpo māveriya tan varutanit talaivarai kurukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷi
m pola vīramun=tiyākamum viḷaṅka [pārmicai ] t(tu)tamainta tinacintāmaṇi puvana muḻutuṭaiyā(ḷ) ḷiruppa Avanuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟiruntena maṅkaiyar tilakam Ēḻicai vallavi Ēḻulaka muṭaiyāḷ Ūḻiya marn tinitiruppa Ūḻiyum puvana muḻutuṭaiyāḷuṭan virasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟi—
tu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkatevarkku śrī kāriyañ ceykiṟa Atikārikaḷ viraviccātira mūventa veḷār Evalpaṭi ṉāl vela nāṭṭu ko ku coḻan tiruvaraṅkattāḻvārkku cantirātittavar yerippataṟku vaitta tiru nantā viḷakku 1- kku ḷ 1- kku ney Uḻa—
yiṟṟil Āḻvār Iṭaiyaril nānṟān koṇṭa Āṭu 10 4 lu peruvāyal pakuvāyan koṇṭa Āṭu 10 4 lum Āccan kovarccunan koṇṭa Āṭu 10 3 nṟum maṇavāḷan cāttan koṇṭa Āṭu 10 4- lum paḷḷi koṇṭān Aravamuṭaiyān koṇṭaIncomplete, covered up by brass plates.—
Digital edition of SII 24.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
